vocab.meaning: sự tập trung toàn bộ/không bị phân tán
vocab.example: I prefer studying in solitude because it allows me to give my undivided attention to the material at hand.

vocab.meaning: phản hồi mang tính xây dựng
vocab.example: Group study is invaluable when you need constructive feedback on your presentation skills before an exam.

vocab.meaning: học tập theo tốc độ cá nhân
vocab.example: Studying alone facilitates self-paced learning, ensuring I don't feel rushed by faster peers or slowed down by others.
Whenever I feel demotivated, the mutual encouragement within a study circle helps me regain my momentum.

vocab.meaning: đạt được trạng thái cực kỳ tập trung (trạng thái trôi chảy)
vocab.example: It is much easier to attain a state of flow when I am working in a quiet, isolated environment.
Collaborative learning is an excellent way to identify and bridge any knowledge gaps I might have missed on my own.

vocab.meaning: những sự xao nhãng từ việc giao tiếp xã hội
vocab.example: I tend to avoid large groups as they often lead to social distractions rather than productive academic progress.

vocab.meaning: củng cố sự hiểu biết của ai đó về vấn đề gì
vocab.example: Explaining a concept to a classmate is a brilliant way to solidify my own grasp of the subject matter.
As an autonomous learner, I feel more empowered when I can navigate the syllabus independently.
For creative projects, collective brainstorming provides a wealth of perspectives that I couldn't generate alone.
